properties.sql-pre-query:
UPDATE PROFILE_CDR_${MSISDN:substring(${MSISDN:length():minus(1)})} SET 
BILLING_ACCOUNT_NUMBER=(CASE '${NEW_ACCOUNT_ID}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${NEW_ACCOUNT_ID}' END),
ADDRESS=(CASE '${ADDRESS}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${ADDRESS}' END),
DOB=(CASE '${DATE_OF_BIRTH}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${DATE_OF_BIRTH}' END),
EMAIL_ID=(CASE '${EMAIL_ID}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${EMAIL_ID}' END),
SUBSCRIBER_FIRST_NAME=(CASE '${FIRST_NAME}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${FIRST_NAME}' END),
SUBSCRIBER_LAST_NAME=(CASE '${LAST_NAME}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${LAST_NAME}' END),
LANGUAGE_ID=(CASE '${LANGUAGE}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${LANGUAGE}' END)
WHERE MSISDN='${MSISDN}';

properties.putsql-sql-statement:
INSERT INTO ${tablename}(DOB,LANGUAGE_ID,REFERRAL_CODE,CUSTOMER_STATUS,SUBSCRIBER_FIRST_NAME,SUBSCRIBER_LAST_NAME,BILLING_ACCOUNT_NUMBER,ADDRESS,ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID,CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID,MSISDN,EMAIL_ID) 
VALUES(
(CASE '${DOB}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${DOB}' END),
(CASE '${LANGUAGE}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${LANGUAGE}' END),
(CASE '${REFERRAL_CODE}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${REFERRAL_CODE}' END),
(CASE '${STATUS}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${STATUS:equals('Active'):ifElse('1','0')}' END),
(CASE '${FIRST_NAME}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${FIRST_NAME}' END),
(CASE '${LAST_NAME}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${LAST_NAME}' END),
(CASE '${BILLING_ACCOUNT_NUMBER}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${BILLING_ACCOUNT_NUMBER}' END),
(CASE '${ADDRESS}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${ADDRESS}' END),
(CASE '${ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID}' END),
(CASE '${CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID}' END),
(CASE '${MSISDN}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${MSISDN}' END),
(CASE '${EMAIL_ID}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${EMAIL_ID}' END))

properties.sql-post-query:
INSERT INTO PROFILE_CDR_${NEW_MSISDN:substring(${NEW_MSISDN:length():minus(1)})} SELECT * FROM PROFILE_CDR_${OLD_MSISDN:substring(${OLD_MSISDN:length():minus(1)})} WHERE MSISDN='${NEW_MSISDN}';

DELETE FROM PROFILE_CDR_${OLD_MSISDN:substring(${OLD_MSISDN:length():minus(1)})} WHERE MSISDN='${NEW_MSISDN}';
properties.sql-pre-query: UPDATE PROFILE_CDR_${OLD_MSISDN:substring(${OLD_MSISDN:length():minus(1)})} SET MSISDN=(CASE '${NEW_MSISDN}' WHEN '' THEN NULL ELSE '${NEW_MSISDN}' END) WHERE MSISDN='${OLD_MSISDN}';
